requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety & Thermal Runaway Propagation — BESS (EU/International)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统消防安全与热失控扩散（欧盟／国际）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統消防安全與熱失控擴散（歐盟／國際）

summary.en: EN IEC 62933-5-2:2020 and EN IEC 62619:2022 underpin EU fire-safety expectations for grid-connected BESS. For Malta, which follows EU market rules through MCCAA and MCCAA-adopted harmonised standards, installations must demonstrate that thermal runaway in one cell does not propagate uncontrolled to adjacent cells or modules, and that fire-compartment and extinguishing strategy is justified against EN 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 criteria. UL 9540A is still frequently requested by insurers and installers for BESS project permitting and risk-class design in EU contexts.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62933-5-2:2020 和 EN IEC 62619:2022构成马耳他（随欧盟一致性要求）BESS消防安全的欧盟依据。马耳他市场要求安装项目证明单一电芯热失控不会不受控蔓延至相邻电芯/模组，并以EN 62619/IEC 62933-5-2标准为依据说明防火分区和灭火策略。保险公司和安装商在欧盟项目审批中仍常要求UL 9540A试验结果，用于风险分级与防火分区设计。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62933-5-2:2020 與 EN IEC 62619:2022 構成馬耳他（隨歐盟一致性要求）BESS消防安全的歐盟依據。馬耳他市場要求安裝項目證明單一電芯熱失控不會不受控蔓延至相鄰電芯／模組，並以EN 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 為依據說明防火分隔與滅火策略。保險公司和安裝商在歐盟專案核准中仍常要求UL 9540A試驗結果，用於風險分級與防火分隔設計。

standards_or_laws: UL 9540A (current revision in force in EU project workflows via market practice)

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 covers lithium-ion battery packs and systems for stationary energy storage, including cell- and module-level abuse and thermal tests. It does not embed a full, EU-equivalent battery-pack-level propagation model aligned to EN IEC 62933-5-2 Annex C, and UL 9540A-style heat-release and fire-spread reports are not a native deliverable format in Chinese test ecosystems for many exporters.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023覆盖固定式储能锂离子电池和电池系统的电芯、模组级安全测试，包括过载与热安全试验，但并未完整体现IEC 62933-5-2附录C所要求的欧盟体系级热失控传播模型。UL 9540A热释放/火扩散类报告在中国测试体系中并非常态输出格式。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023涵蓋固定式儲能鋰離子電池及電池系統的電芯、模組級安全測試，包括過載與熱安全試驗，但未完整體現IEC 62933-5-2附錄C所要求的歐盟體系級熱失控傳播模型。UL 9540A熱釋放／火蔓延類報告在中國測試體系中並非常態輸出格式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion battery packs and systems for electric energy storage
GB 44240-2024 — Safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage

gap.en: Key gap: Chinese test reports under GB/T 36276 typically do not include all EU-style system-level thermal-propagation artefacts requested in Maltese/EU permitting workflows, particularly UL 9540A-style fire spread and HRR data. Even where fire compartment approvals are project-specific, documentation teams in Malta usually expect a mapping matrix linking EU clauses to Chinese test evidence and this is frequently incomplete.
gap.zh: 主要差距：中国企业基于GB/T 36276出具的报告通常不含欧盟（含马耳他）审批中常见的全系统热失控传播证据，尤其缺少UL 9540A式火势蔓延与热释放速率数据。即便消防许可属于项目化评估，马耳他端通常也需要一份将欧盟条款与中国测试证据逐条对应的映射表，这常常不完整。
gap.zht: 主要差距：中國企業基於GB/T 36276出具的報告通常不含歐盟（含馬耳他）核准中常見的全系統熱失控傳播證據，尤其缺少UL 9540A式火勢蔓延與熱釋放速率數據。即便消防許可屬於項目化評估，馬耳他端通常也需要一份將歐盟條款與中國測試證據逐條對應的映射表，這常常不完整。

mandatory_status.target: Target mandatory baseline in Malta is EU-level conformity for market entry, including conformity declarations and grid connection files where required. EN IEC 62933-5-2 and EN IEC 62619 are not legal clauses themselves; they create conformity paths and potential presumption where cited as harmonised references. UL 9540A is generally market-driven and not a legal requirement by itself.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid projects in China through mandatory grid-operator and procurement review where applicable (notably NEA/State Grid pathways), while GB/T 36276 and GB 44240 remain the core technical references in Chinese practice.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS products that only carry GB/T-based thermal evidence can face project-level documentation gaps in Malta for fire safety if UL 9540A-style spread data and clause mapping are missing. Align test scope and dossier architecture before shipment and permit submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅凭GB/T体系热安全证据的中国储能产品在马耳他推进项目许可时，可能因缺少UL 9540A传播数据与条款映射而出现文件缺口。建议在发货和提交许可前对接齐全测试范围与资料结构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅憑GB/T體系熱安全證據的中國儲能產品在馬耳他推進項目許可時，可能因缺少UL 9540A傳播數據與條款映射而出現文件缺口。建議在發貨和提交許可前對接齊全測試範圍與資料架構。
